bib.title: Refinement in tuple space languages
bib.citation: Università di Pisa. Dipartimento di Informatica, 1996
bib.author: Laura Semini
bib.publisher: Università di Pisa. Dipartimento di Informatica
bib.abstract: In Pisa I met very nice colleagues. I'm grateful to all of them for the professional hints they gave me, and for their friendship. Among them, let me thank Vincenzo Ambriola and the other people of the Oikos group for the joint works on tuple space languages.
